citation_tightness.note: The Limitations section discusses corpus distribution without an adjacent citation marker, violating citation tightness requirements.

completeness.note: Major evidence rows (primary trials, regulatory status, key safety) are addressed, with completeness checklist confirming 7/7 topics covered.

flow.note: Sections logically progress from competitive positioning to regulatory, efficacy, safety, and limitations, maintaining coherent structure.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Prose appropriately flags third-party opinions (e.g., 'another source positions', 'one analysis framing') without overconfidence.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded, avoiding promotional language while presenting competitive analysis objectively.
